title: Manufacture of 2CR material for welded can with superior workability into flange
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain 2CR material for a welded can with superior workability into a flange by hot rolling an Mn steel having a restricted C content, specifying the finish rolling temp., and coiling or soaking and holding the hot rolled steel at a prescribed temp.
CONSTITUTION: A steel consisting of ≤0.025wt% C, >0.6W1.5wt% Mn and the balance Fe with inevitable impurities is hot rolled. The hot finish rolling is carried out at a temp. below the A<sub>3</sub>point, and the hot rolled steel is coiled at ≥600°C or soaked and held at the temp. By the treatment, the grains after cold rolling and annealing are coarsened, and the softening of the material during welding is effectively inhibited. By this method, 2CR material for a welded can with superior workability into a flange is obtd.
